creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
I'm sorry, but I switched from scim to ibus, since scim crashes frequently here.
So I cannot track the updates of scim-bridge and scim-bridge-qt4, and
I cannot easily verify if it works here.
If you have time, would you please take the maintainer of
textproc/scim-bridge and textproc/scim-bridge-qt4?

-- 
Cheers,
Henry
